# FinOpsAssess cmdlet reference

Auto-generated from comment-based help using Microsoft.PowerShell.PlatyPS v1.0.1.
Run `pwsh ./scripts/generate_ps_cmdlet_docs.ps1` to regenerate.

> MAML bundling is intentionally deferred for Phase 7c. Runtime `Get-Help` currently uses comment-based help.

## Module topics

- [FinOpsAssess](FinOpsAssess.md)

## Core

| Cmdlet | Synopsis |
|---|---|
| [Get-FinOpsInfo](Get-FinOpsInfo.md) | Reports module version, read-only posture, and in-scope surfaces. |
| [Invoke-FinOpsAssessment](Invoke-FinOpsAssessment.md) | Runs the native FinOps assessment over a directory of normalised CSVs. |
| [Invoke-FinOpsTriage](Invoke-FinOpsTriage.md) | Builds advisory triage JSON/CSV artefacts from an existing report JSON. |
| [Test-FinOpsConfiguration](Test-FinOpsConfiguration.md) | Self-tests the module's structural integrity and version lock. |

## Exporters

| Cmdlet | Synopsis |
|---|---|
| [Export-FinOpsFocusAligned](Export-FinOpsFocusAligned.md) | Exports a FOCUS-aligned advisory CSV + manifest from a report JSON. |
| [Export-FinOpsPlaybook](Export-FinOpsPlaybook.md) | Exports playbook ticket JSONL + manifest from an existing report JSON. |

## Live collection

| Cmdlet | Synopsis |
|---|---|
| [Invoke-FinOpsLiveCollection](Invoke-FinOpsLiveCollection.md) | Collects live, read-only data for one Microsoft-ecosystem surface and writes normalized CSVs to disk. |

## Read-only guards

| Cmdlet | Synopsis |
|---|---|
| [Assert-FinOpsReadOnlyScope](Assert-FinOpsReadOnlyScope.md) | Refuses to proceed unless a credential is provably read-only. |
| [Test-FinOpsReadOnlyScope](Test-FinOpsReadOnlyScope.md) | Classifies a credential's granted scopes as read-only or write-capable. |
